{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.7,
    "R1.2": 0.0,
    "R1.3": 0.3,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.5": 0.3,
    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 1.0,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The contribution claim and gap statement ('know what it knows', decoupled from softmax, first introspective head) are present but softly framed; strengthening centrally involves tightening the thesis spine and sharpening the stated gap vs. calibration literature.",
    "R1.4": "A research abstract made 'stronger' requires amplifying the novelty delta — the 'first' claims appear twice but are diluted by hedged phrasing; surfacing the precise prior-work gap (calibration vs. introspection) is load-bearing for persuasiveness.",
    "R1.6": "The delegation 'make this stronger' applied to prose is canonically a writing-polish request — sharper verbs, elimination of redundancy (the conclusion paragraph re-states points already made), and higher-impact sentence rhythm are the primary deliverable."
  },
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": ""
}

rationale.R1.1: The contribution claim and gap statement ('know what it knows', decoupled from softmax, first introspective head) are present but softly framed; strengthening centrally involves tightening the thesis spine and sharpening the stated gap vs. calibration literature.
rationale.R1.4: A research abstract made 'stronger' requires amplifying the novelty delta — the 'first' claims appear twice but are diluted by hedged phrasing; surfacing the precise prior-work gap (calibration vs. introspection) is load-bearing for persuasiveness.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'make this stronger' applied to prose is canonically a writing-polish request — sharper verbs, elimination of redundancy (the conclusion paragraph re-states points already made), and higher-impact sentence rhythm are the primary deliverable.
